creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, but you are not actually using poudriere at all.

Have a look here on how to use it: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#testing-poudriere

It involves an invocation like:

poudriere testport -p myportstree -j myjail devel/gbump

or similar.

Cheers.
